purpose: Reusable scaffold for stochastic programming, robust optimization, chance constraints, distributionally robust optimization, and risk-aware optimization deployments.
intended_use: Copy this folder when decisions depend on uncertain demand, supply, costs, arrivals, processing times, disruptions, or forecast errors.
Fill uncertainty model, scenario generator, deterministic equivalent or robust counterpart, risk measure, evaluation, and run-record contracts.
Use out-of-sample testing and common random numbers to compare methods fairly.
non_goals: This asset is not a complete stochastic solver.
This asset does not invent uncertainty distributions without documented assumptions.
This asset does not treat in-sample scenario performance as final evidence.
This asset must not be used to generate toy or minimal examples that omit uncertainty calibration, scenario manifests, risk metrics, progress output, and out-of-sample evaluation.

top_level_paths.models: Stochastic, robust, and DRO model contract.
top_level_paths.data: Historical samples, forecasts, and scenario input notes.
top_level_paths.scripts: Foreground run and compact result-collection templates.
top_level_paths.run_records: Structured uncertainty optimization run logging templates.
